name: Washmen Ops Workspace
postCreateCommand: git submodule update --init --recursive && sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y jq openvpn && curl -sL https://awscli.amazonaws.com/awscli-exe-linux-x86_64.zip -o /tmp/awscliv2.zip && (cd /tmp && unzip -qo awscliv2.zip && sudo ./aws/install) && rm -rf /tmp/aws /tmp/awscliv2.zip && sudo corepack enable && corepack prepare yarn@3.2.4 --activate && bash .devcontainer/setup-vpn-config.sh; bash core/setup.sh
postStartCommand: git submodule update --init --recursive && bash .devcontainer/start-openvpn.sh; bash core/start.sh

AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID.description: AWS access key — Secrets Manager resolution + SDK access (DynamoDB, S3, SNS)

AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY.description: AWS secret key — Secrets Manager resolution + SDK access

WASHMEN_GITHUB_TOKEN.description: GitHub PAT with repo scope for cloning and pushing

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.description: Anthropic API key for Claude Agent SDK

VPN_PRIVATE_KEY.description: Private key for AWS Client VPN (PEM format, base64-encoded)

GOOGLE_MAPS_KEY.description: Google Maps API key for frontend (repo-level secret)

ALGOLIA_API_KEY.description: Algolia search-only API key for frontend (repo-level secret)

SENTRY_DSN.description: Sentry DSN for error reporting — frontend (repo-level secret)

E2E_CLIENT_SECRET.description: Cognito E2E client secret for dev iframe auth (repo-level secret)

MUIX_LICENSE_KEY.description: MUI X commercial license key for frontend (repo-level secret)
